column1: Chandler Simpson leads the pack today with a scorching 74.6% hit probability, setting the tone atop Tampa Bay’s lineup at home with a prime platoon advantage against Jose Urquidy. George Springer isn’t far behind, bringing his steady veteran bat and top-of-order role on the road for the Mets—he draws a hittable arm in Zach Pop and should see plenty of pitches to work with. Roman Anthony and Jonathan Aranda both benefit from favorable matchups and strong lineup spots, making them solid fallback options for those chasing streaks. For Beat The Streak players, Simpson is the clear-cut anchor, but the top five all carry reliable profiles worth a look.
